  Message from Linda Ford, Subject: Agroverse Regenerating our Amazon rainforest, One Cacao at a time, Or here at the top of page. No indicator of how to open an acct or sign in or check out. Saying kindly that if one has to meander around to find these buttons then how will your company make sales for the chocolate. Oh… would be wise to write the word ‘chocolate’ adjacent to cacao. Is this helpful? IMHO , It will be more user friendly, familiar and comfy for Americans to see these changes so to try a new type of chocolate . Good luck. Night., Attachment: Image, Monday, 6 April 2026, 6:28 pm.

  10:36
  Message from Linda Ford, Subject: Noticed something, I hope you know that we are impressed with the method, venture and the philosophy. Did you see, The video spelled cacao : Cacau. Is that an alternative spelling? The word Chocolate in big friendly letters begs to be used on the web page Could the small print under section describing the mission be made larger and bolder. Old eyes have a hard time with the small thin letters. How do you get web changes made? You? Im happy for you Gary and hope you can continue to do well in spite of the challenges day by day. In other News, Trump says he will become President of Venezuela and learn Spanish quickly. Omg! 🤪, Tuesday, 7 April 2026, 10:36 am.
  L
